reviews.review_description:
Good that it was made in a week, by a small team that was challenging themselves to come up with something.

Graphics are ok, cartoon style.

Gameplay not much to it other than knocking robots around a small arena, and trying to dispose of them around the edge of the arena.

Ok for a quick blast… but has nothing to keep you wanting to get further.

You don’t expect much from a game made in a week, I wasn’t hopeful, but actually it’s ok, early access so does need more work but what I played I had fun.
Cheap as chips so probably worth a punt.
Cartoony graphics but looked sharp.
Hope the devs add more content but a good start.
Not bad game easy play x

Iron Riot even as early access delivers a solid, action-packed experience with fast-paced combat and impressive mech designs. The game excels in its cartoon simplistic visuals, offering detailed environments and smooth animations that make battles feel intense and exciting. The core gameplay is straightforward and fun, especially for fans of mech combat.  
While the combat is engaging, it did feel a little repetitive but that was more about my in ability to quickly destroy enemies and I look forward to gaining more experience and progressing with this game.
